content:
- Deep-skeptical reviewed task 09 plan and adjusted it (non-blocking API step_once and no Mutex for DcsStore).
- Implemented typed API handlers (switchover + fallback) and minimal HTTP transport worker with auth gating and debug snapshot endpoint.
- Implemented DebugApi snapshot worker publishing SystemSnapshot from subscribers.
- Added unit tests for API handlers, a BDD integration test hitting the real TCP listener, and updated worker contract tests to avoid expect() in the touched contract test.
- Ran make check/test/lint/test-bdd; hit a stale/corrupted target archive error during make test-bdd and fixed via cargo clean, then all gates green.
- Updated task 09 markdown to done/passing and ran .ralph/task_switch.sh.
- Next: if time allows, consider a follow-up bug/task to systematically remove expect()/panic! from older tests (bdd_state_watch + watch_state + others) to match the "no expect/panic" policy.

- Read progress log and parsed .ralph/current_tasks.md for all available tasks.
- Evaluated selection rules: there are many <passes>false</passes> tasks; bug tasks exist but none have explicit <priority>. Story-rust-system-harness has uncompleted ultra_high tasks, so per mandatory priority + STORY CHAIN rule selected the next unblocked ultra_high chain item.
- Wrote .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/13-task-e2e-multi-node-real-ha-loops-scenario-matrix.md to .ralph/current_task.txt. Next agent should execute that task.

- Read progress log and checked current tasks/bug lists.
- Reviewed .ralph/current_tasks.md plus specific bug/task files for panic/unwrap removal.
- Reported active bugs and priority notes to PO via email.
- Next: await further instructions; no code changes made.

- Read prior progress (empty output), read .ralph/current_task.txt, and loaded task 13 file.
- Followed the requested phase workflow: this turn stayed in planning-only mode because task 13 had no TO BE VERIFIED/NOW EXECUTE marker.
- Ran broad parallel exploration across repo/test harness/HA worker/task history (many parallel shell queries) to build a concrete implementation plan.
- Confirmed blockers 09/10/12 are marked done + passing.
- Identified critical gap: real etcd-backed DCS adapter is not implemented in current codebase (task 10b also not started), and there is no top-level node binary yet.
- Wrote a full detailed execution plan into task 13 with explicit steps for: real etcd adapter, multi-node fixture, scenario matrix, observability artifacts, and verification gates.
- Appended TO BE VERIFIED at end of task file and stopped before any code execution, per workflow.
- Next: when invoked on TO BE VERIFIED phase, do deep skeptical review, alter at least one plan item, then switch marker to NOW EXECUTE only after that review.

- Read PO email requesting clearer bug-first instruction in ralph choose-task doc.
- Updated .ralph/ralph-choose-task.md to add an explicit BUG-FIRST rule near the top and reinforced checklist wording.
- Notified PO with start/plan/progress/completion emails.
- Next: await further instructions.

- Ran deep skeptical verification for task 13 with broad parallel code/task audit (16+ parallel probes).
- Found concrete mismatch: task plan assumed async DcsStore evolution, but current codebase relies on sync DcsStore everywhere (api/ha/dcs worker call shapes), making async trait churn high-risk.
- Confirmed real binaries are now present in this environment: PostgreSQL 16.11 tools and etcd 3.6.8.
- Found planned switchover gap: API writes switchover key but HA decide loop currently never consumes switchover intent; plan needed explicit production work for this.
- Updated task 13 execution_plan accordingly: keep sync DcsStore contract, implement real etcd adapter with internal async bridge/watch pump, wire watch had_errors into health, add explicit switchover semantics step, clarify control-plane-only assertions.
- Replaced TO BE VERIFIED -> NOW EXECUTE per required workflow; moving into execution mode next.
